caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, over-the-ear headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold letters sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. In the background, white banners feature gold stars and the text "UNICORN HUSTLE," while a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table, there is a black box with a logo and a white container with red text that says "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing; in the second frame, he lifts his right hand to emphasize a point. He remains in a consistent seated position, facing slightly toward the right of the frame, while his facial expressions shift as he continues talking into the microphone.
